## What changed

Describe the implementation or documentation change in 3–5 lines.

## Why this change is needed

Explain the DSP, C++, verification, documentation or benchmark problem this PR solves.

## Validation

- [ ] CMake configure passed
- [ ] Build passed
- [ ] CTest passed
- [ ] Benchmark/report updated, if relevant
- [ ] Generated plots are reproducible, if relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated, if relevant
- [ ] No private data or credentials committed

## Evidence

Link or attach logs, plots, benchmark tables, generated reports or test vectors.

## Risks

What can regress? What numerical assumptions or tolerances changed?
